---
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::::: landing-page-block
:::: hero-text
::: text-center
![](_extensions/seedcase-project/seedcase-theme/logos/sprout/icon.svg){fig-alt="Sprout logo."
width="150px"}

![](_extensions/seedcase-project/seedcase-theme/logos/sprout/font.svg){fig-alt="Sprout font."
height="50px"}

## Grow organised and FAIR data

[Overview](/docs/index.qmd){.btn .about-link} [Explore
guide](/docs/guide/index.qmd){.btn .about-link}
:::
::::
:::::

:::: landing-page-block
::: {#hero-heading}
{{< include /docs/includes/_badges.qmd >}}
:::
::::

::::: hero-banner
:::: landing-page-block
::: hero-text
Sprout is a Python package for building up, describing, and managing
research data. It structures your data as standardised
[Data Packages](https://datapackage.org/) that follow the
[FAIR](https://www.go-fair.org/fair-principles/) principles, giving you
flexibility and control over each step of the data management workflow.

## Key features :sparkles:

-   Creates and manages standardised
    [Data Packages](https://datapackage.org/) with metadata stored in
    `datapackage.json`.
-   Checks both your metadata and your data against the Data Package
    standard, with clear messages pointing directly to where issues
    occur.
-   Stores data in [Apache Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/)
    format---an open, efficient, and widely supported format.
-   Tracks data changes through a batch system with automatic
    versioning, supporting data lineage and auditability.
-   Auto-extracts field properties from your data, so you spend less
    time writing metadata manually.
:::
::::
:::::

::::: landing-page-block
:::: hero-text
## About the Seedcase Project

Sprout is part of the [**Seedcase
Project**](https://seedcase-project.org), which helps research projects
manage and process data in line with the
[FAIR](https://www.go-fair.org/fair-principles/) principles.

::: text-center
[Check out the Seedcase Project](https://seedcase-project.org/){.btn
.about-link}
:::
::::
:::::

::::: hero-banner
:::: landing-page-block
::: hero-text
## Want to contribute?

We would love your feedback or contributions! Head over to the [GitHub
repository](https://github.com/seedcase-project/seedcase-sprout) to
share your ideas or contribute code. Your input makes us better!
:::
::::
:::::
